description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a multi-tiered, roughly hewn rectangular base, with a smaller stone block adjacent to it. The main shaft of the obelisk rises vertically from the center of the base, featuring a smooth front face with a rectangular relief plaque near the top and a large inscribed panel below. The sides and rear of the base are more rugged, with a natural stone texture, while the front is more finished and formal. The adjacent block appears to be a secondary marker or plaque, set slightly apart on the same stone platform. The monument is situated on a square patch of ground, bordered by grass and a stone or concrete perimeter.
description: A tall stone obelisk monument with a multi-tiered, rugged base and a relief plaque on the front, accompanied by a smaller stone block on a square platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscribed panel, relief plaque, and the adjacent smaller stone block on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rugged, natural stone texture of the base and the rear of the obelisk.
description_view_2: Rear view with the obelisk's back face and the square platform, less detail visible on the shaft.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smaller stone block on the right and the rough stone base.
attribute_inscription: There is a large inscribed panel on the front face of the obelisk, below the relief plaque. The inscription appears to be in English, with block lettering, but the text is not fully legible in the images.
attribute_ornamentation: A rectangular relief plaque is present near the top of the front face, depicting a scene or portrait in low relief. No other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of multiple stacked rectangular stone blocks with a rough-hewn, natural stone texture. The front is more finished, and a smaller stone block sits adjacent to the main base on the platform.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is a simple, flat-topped rectangular prism with no visible ornamentation or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square stone or concrete platform bordered by grass, with a smaller stone block marker nearby.
